ComponentDescription: Publishes Hello World to IoT Core via coreMQTT PoC

run.script:
python3 -c "
import json, time, signal, sys
try:
    from awsiot.greengrasscoreipc.clientv2 import GreengrassCoreIPCClientV2
except ImportError:
    print('awsiotsdk not available', flush=True)
    sys.exit(1)

running = True
def handler(s,f): global running; running = False
signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, handler)

print('Starting coreMQTT PoC publisher...', flush=True)
ipc = GreengrassCoreIPCClientV2()
count = 0
while running:
    count += 1
    msg = json.dumps({'message': 'Hello from coreMQTT PoC!', 'count': count, 'timestamp': int(time.time())})
    try:
        ipc.publish_to_iot_core(topic_name='gg/coremqtt/hello', qos=1, payload=msg.encode())
        print(f'Published #{count} to gg/coremqtt/hello', flush=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error: {e}', flush=True)
    time.sleep(10)
"
